patch_analysis: [FileChange(file_path='server/src/main/java/io/crate/expression/reference/doc/lucene/StoredRow.java', change_type='MODIFIED', added_lines=['return extractValueHelper(list, path, i);', '', 'private static Object extractValueHelper(final List<?> list, List<String> path, int pathStartIndex) {', 'if (pathStartIndex + 1 == path.size()) {', 'return list;', '}', 'ArrayList<Object> newList = new ArrayList<>(list.size());', 'for (Object o : list) {', 'if (o instanceof Map<?,?> m) {', 'newList.add(extractValue(m, path, pathStartIndex + 1));', '} else if (o instanceof List<?> l) {', 'newList.add(extractValueHelper(l, path, pathStartIndex));', '} else {', 'newList.add(o);', '}', '}', 'return newList;', '}'], removed_lines=['if (i + 1 == path.size()) {', 'return list;', '}', 'ArrayList<Object> newList = new ArrayList<>(list.size());', 'for (Object o : list) {', 'if (o instanceof Map) {', 'newList.add(extractValue((Map<?, ?>) o, path, i + 1));', '} else {', 'newList.add(o);', '}', '}', 'return newList;'], is_test_file=False, previous_file_path=None), FileChange(file_path='server/src/main/java/io/crate/metadata/table/TableInfo.java', change_type='MODIFIED', added_lines=['type -> type instanceof ArrayType && ArrayType.unnest(type).id() == ObjectType.ID;', 'arrayDimensions += ArrayType.dimensions(parent.valueType());'], removed_lines=['type -> type instanceof ArrayType && ((ArrayType<?>) type).innerType().id() == ObjectType.ID;', 'arrayDimensions++;'], is_test_file=False, previous_file_path=None)]
